_comment: EXAMPLE schema for the Conference Rooms module config. Copy to module-config-ConferenceRooms.json in the deployed instance's config/ directory and replace placeholders with your environment's real groups/OU/contacts (or set them via the Module Config admin page). Real values are deploy-only and not stored in source control. RestrictedMailTip/ExecMailTip/OnPremDelineaSecretId are optional and omitted here.
